title: Assertion failure when using `INNER JOIN` on `STARTSWITH`
description: The following test case crashed the monetdb server.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 String, c1 Int32 CHECK (c1 >= 0));
CREATE TABLE t1 (c0 UInt8 NOT NULL DEFAULT 1);
SELECT * FROM t1 INNER JOIN t0 ON position(t0.c0, toString(t1.c0)) = 1;
key_bug_features: INNER JOIN using STARTSWITH with incompatible data types
